notes: Nouryon's personal care division offers a strong range of sustainable, naturally derived texture-modifying ingredients centered on cellulose chemistry and biopolymers. Their Bermocoll™ cellulose ether range provides excellent thickening, film-forming, and texture-modifying performance across a wide pH range, making them highly versatile for diverse formulation types. Nouryon's Amaze™ biopolymer film former is a compelling sustainable, naturally derived alternative to synthetic film formers, delivering excellent hold and texture performance with a clean ingredient profile. ISCC PLUS certified supply chains and RSPO credentials support brands making sustainability claims in the European and North American premium markets.

Nouryon's personal care division offers a range of sustainable texture-modifying ingredients based on cellulose chemistry and biopolymers. Their Bermocoll™ cellulose ether range provides excellent thickening, film-forming, and texture-modifying performance across a wide range of pH values and formulation types. Nouryon's Amaze™ biopolymer film former is a sustainable, naturally derived alternative to synthetic film formers, delivering excellent hold and texture with a clean ingredient profile. ISCC PLUS certification enables brands to make verified sustainability claims.
